werbepartner_content: Increase your reach: Advertise on my website!
Do you want to present your products or services to a broad audience? My website offers you the ideal platform to make your brand known and gain new customers.
• Nationwide visibility: Reach visitors from all over the country and increase your reach effectively.
• Maximum attention: Your ad is shown to all visitors regardless of their location.
• Fair presentation: The order of the ads is randomly rearranged with every page view so that all advertising partners have the same chance of visibility.
• Privacy guaranteed: I only determine the visitor's country of origin. No other data is recorded.
Your ad space is only shown to visitors from the respective country. If you want to advertise internationally, you can book additional ad spaces for other countries.
Secure your advertising space now and reach your target audience directly, perfectly adapted to the region that is relevant to you!
• For the first 90 days you only pay 140 Francs per 30 days of presence.
• From the 91st day, the price is reduced to 120 Francs per 30 days of presence (for days 91 to 180).
• From the 181st day, the advertising space only costs 100 Francs per 30 days of presence.
• A link to your offer (product page or service page)
• A link to an image to be used in the advertising space (image size: 500x300 pixels)
I focus on quality and trustworthiness. Every advertising partner is personally checked by me to ensure that they are reputable companies that meet my high standards.
Contact me today and place your brand on my website. Together we will develop a strong presence and move your company forward sustainably.
Send me a message if you need more information or want to book an advertising space directly. I look forward to supporting you on your path to success!
